jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Workflow-Automation Platform
jobs.content:
About the role

Lead service development for Asana's workflow-automation infrastructure handling tens of millions of task-graph mutations per day across 150,000+ enterprise customers.

  • Distributed-systems and event-sourcing experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Customer-Experience Strategy
jobs.content: Own Asana's customer-experience strategy roadmap across enterprise-onboarding, expansion, and renewal motion-design.
